summary: Testing of Admin Impersonation feature and Dashboard Budget Tabs completed. All 8 backend tests passed (100%). All 6 frontend features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Admin impersonation endpoints correctly create temporary sessions with is_impersonation flag
Impersonation session includes admin_user_id for audit trail
Frontend AuthContext properly manages impersonation state with startImpersonation/stopImpersonation functions
Session tokens are properly stored/restored in sessionStorage during impersonation
Dashboard budget comparison card correctly uses Tabs component with 'Gastos' and 'Ingresos' tabs
Impersonation banner correctly shows user info and 'Volver al Panel Admin' button
Non-admin users correctly receive 403 when attempting to impersonate
seed_data_creation: Test user 'test.impersonate@example.com' created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Impersonation feature fully tested and working. Backend endpoints POST /api/admin/impersonate/{user_id} and POST /api/admin/stop-impersonation work correctly. Frontend components verified: Dashboard budget-comparison-card with Gastos/Ingresos tabs, Admin page impersonate-user-btn, Layout impersonation-banner with stop-impersonation-btn. Auth uses Google OAuth - authenticated pages tested via session cookie injection with admin token.

backend_impersonate_endpoint.details: Creates temporary impersonation session, returns impersonation_token and user info

backend_stop_impersonation_endpoint.details: Deletes impersonation session, returns success message

dashboard_budget_tabs.details: Budget comparison card has Tabs component with 'Gastos' and 'Ingresos' tabs that switch content correctly

admin_impersonate_button.details: 'Ver como usuario' button appears when viewing non-admin user details, triggers impersonation flow

impersonation_banner.details: Yellow/amber banner appears at top when impersonating, shows 'Modo Asesor: Viendo como [user]'

stop_impersonation_button.details: 'Volver al Panel Admin' button in banner, stops impersonation and navigates back to /admin

tests_passed: Frontend: Budget card has Gastos and Ingresos tabs
Frontend: Admin page shows impersonate-user-btn for non-admin users
Frontend: Clicking impersonate navigates to dashboard with banner
Frontend: Impersonation banner shows correct user info
Frontend: Stop impersonation button navigates back to admin
